# PageDiff API

Pay-per-call historical page-change evidence for AI agents. Check Wayback snapshot availability, compare archived pages, and generate structured reports with important changes, impact, risks, source timestamps, and shareable report URLs.

## When to use this API

Use PageDiff when you need to detect, summarize, or interpret text changes between two historical versions of a public web page. It is best for competitor pricing changes, terms and privacy policy monitoring, documentation drift, product positioning changes, compliance page audits, and historical evidence packs for AI agents.

Do not use PageDiff for live scraping, crawling many pages, JavaScript-rendered screenshots, or private/authenticated pages. Results depend on Internet Archive Wayback snapshot availability.

## Base URL

https://pagediff-api.hahavoid0.workers.dev

## Endpoints

- `POST /snapshot-check`: free preflight. Checks whether usable Wayback HTML snapshots exist.
- `POST /diff`: $0.050. Returns raw added, removed, and modified text blocks.
- `POST /report`: $0.500. Returns one persisted interpreted report with `report_url` and `json_url`.
- `POST /batch-report`: $2.000. Returns up to five persisted interpreted reports plus a persisted batch URL.

Paid endpoints require x402 payment on Base mainnet with USDC.

## Report types

`pricing_intelligence`, `policy_change`, `competitor_positioning`, `docs_drift`, `legal_terms_change`, or `general`.

If `GEMINI_API_KEY` is configured by the service owner, `/report` and `/batch-report` use Gemini to interpret diffs. If Gemini is unavailable or not configured, PageDiff falls back to a deterministic rule-based report.

## Agent workflow

1. Call `/snapshot-check` before paid calls.
2. If snapshots are unavailable, ask for a wider date range or different URL.
3. Use `/diff` for raw text changes.
4. Use `/report` for one interpreted evidence report.
5. Use `/batch-report` for multiple pages.
6. Cite exact snapshot timestamps and include returned report URLs.

## Minimal AgentCash calls

```bash
npx agentcash@latest fetch https://pagediff-api.hahavoid0.workers.dev/report -m POST -b '{"url":"https://example.com/","from":"2023-01-01","to":"2024-01-01","report_type":"pricing_intelligence"}'
```

```bash
npx agentcash@latest fetch https://pagediff-api.hahavoid0.workers.dev/batch-report -m POST -b '{"report_type":"pricing_intelligence","items":[{"url":"https://example.com/","from":"2023-01-01","to":"2024-01-01"},{"url":"https://example.com/pricing","from":"2025-01-01","to":"2026-01-01"}]}'
```
